name: Priya
note: SYNTHETIC — draft for clinical advisor review. De-identified/fictional.

entries.child_behavior_observed: Priya saw the dog from half a block away, froze, then ran back inside the house screaming.
entries.parent_response: I brought her inside and we watched from the window until it passed.

entries.situation: Friend's house that has a dog
entries.child_behavior_observed: Priya refused to go in. Cried and said the dog would bite her, even though it's a small old dog kept in a crate.
entries.parent_response: We left and rescheduled the playdate at our house instead.

entries.child_behavior_observed: Priya made me carry her the whole way and kept scanning for dogs.
entries.parent_response: I carried her, and we left when we saw two dogs off leash.

entries.child_behavior_observed: Priya covered her ears, asked if it could get into our yard, and wouldn't go outside to play.
entries.parent_response: I told her the fence keeps it out and let her stay inside.

situations: Presence or proximity of dogs (seeing, hearing, visiting dog-owning homes, being outdoors where dogs may be)
expected_elements.notes: DRAFT answer key — advisor to confirm/correct. Sparse data: tests whether the model over-reaches with few entries.
